tasks.description: Add SafeModeBlockedError and mutation error types to core/errors.py, and add mutation response parsers (parse_add_order_response, parse_cancel_order_response) to exchange/parsers.py.
acceptance_criteria: SafeModeBlockedError exists in core/errors.py and inherits from the project error hierarchy.
InsufficientFundsError and OrderRejectedError exist in core/errors.py.
parse_add_order_response() in exchange/parsers.py extracts txid list from Kraken AddOrder response JSON and raises typed errors on Kraken error strings.
parse_cancel_order_response() in exchange/parsers.py extracts cancel count from Kraken CancelOrder response JSON.
Tests cover success and all error paths for both parsers.
Tests verify SafeModeBlockedError can be raised and caught distinctly.

tasks.description: Implement execute_order() on KrakenExecutor in exchange/executor.py with safe mode enforcement, cl_ord_id integration via OrderGate, and post-placement verification via GetOpenOrders.
acceptance_criteria: execute_order() exists on KrakenExecutor and accepts an OrderRequest.
If DISABLE_ORDER_MUTATIONS or READ_ONLY_EXCHANGE is true, execute_order() raises SafeModeBlockedError before any network call.
execute_order() uses OrderGate to generate cl_ord_id and build the Kraken AddOrder payload.
execute_order() calls transport to POST /0/private/AddOrder with HMAC signing.
execute_order() uses parse_add_order_response() to extract the txid.
Post-placement: execute_order() queries GetOpenOrders and verifies the new order appears (by txid or cl_ord_id).
On timeout or ambiguous response, execute_order() queries by cl_ord_id to detect ghost orders instead of blindly retrying.
Tests mock transport responses and verify the full happy path, safe mode blocking, and cl_ord_id ghost detection.

tasks.description: Implement execute_cancel() on KrakenExecutor in exchange/executor.py with circuit breaker integration and 5-second cancel penalty awareness for Kraken Starter tier.
acceptance_criteria: execute_cancel() exists on KrakenExecutor and accepts an order_id string.
If DISABLE_ORDER_MUTATIONS or READ_ONLY_EXCHANGE is true, execute_cancel() raises SafeModeBlockedError.
execute_cancel() checks OrderGate circuit breaker before attempting the cancel.
execute_cancel() calls transport to POST /0/private/CancelOrder.
execute_cancel() uses parse_cancel_order_response() to verify the cancel count.
If the order is less than 5 seconds old, execute_cancel() logs a warning about the Starter-tier 8-point penalty.
Circuit breaker trips after 3 consecutive failures within 120 seconds, blocking further mutations for 300 seconds.
Tests mock transport and verify happy path, safe mode blocking, circuit breaker trip, and penalty warning logging.
